calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Petitioner Jeffrey Dare was present in pro per, as Guardian ad Litem for the minors, Gregory Hong Tse and Brittiney Tse.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Fenghuen Gao, the minors' mother, was present, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grante the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Gregory Hong Dare and Brittney Dare.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Reset To Dec-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Petitioner Jeffrey Dare was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Gregory Hong Tse and Brittney Tse.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing as there is no indication in the file that the minors' mother was given notice of the proposed name changes. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to December 9, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for further hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name.
